scripts.setup:test: echo 'Validating .env.appwrite...' && node -e "import('fs').then(fs => { const c = fs.readFileSync('.env.appwrite','utf-8'); if(!c.includes('APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID=') || c.match(/APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID=\s*$/m)) { console.error('Missing PROJECT_ID'); process.exit(1); } console.log('Config looks good!'); })"
